description:
# Goal
Derive the first rooted semantic facts from Compiler2-owned entry-dispatch and lowered-body facts. Semantic work must stay inside Compiler2: no raw-AST semantics and no fallback into the legacy whole-program lower/type/plan pipeline.

# Change
- Add `AnalyzeActivation` as the first rooted semantic job over Compiler2-owned facts.
- Extend activation identity to `{root, function, input}` and store activation-local summaries: widened observed inputs, reachable callsites, and settled return type.
- Analyze only entry-dispatch-reachable lowered clauses, derive direct callsite summaries from lowered steps, and publish `SelectedCallee`, `ReturnNeed`, `ReturnType`, and `ActivationAnalyzed` facts.
- Derive tuple-field executable need from local destructure shape, so `{lo, hi} = partition(...)` publishes `TupleFields(2)` on the callsite.
- Tighten `CheckSemanticClosure` so a root closes only after its live activation and executable frontier has settled.
- Keep root semantic inventory fact-driven: stale speculative activations retract through ordinary fact replacement instead of side indexes.

# Why
- This is the first real semantic fixpoint inside the Compiler2 work graph.
- Entry dispatch remains the only source of clause selection; body semantics consume selected outcomes instead of rebuilding matching ad hoc.
- Rooted semantic facts now revise and retract through the same contribution model as indexing and lowering, which is the shape later recursive convergence work will refine.

# Checks
- Quicksort plus uncalled `foo/0`, rooted at `main/0`, publishes rooted direct call edges for the reachable quicksort path and keeps `foo/0` semantically cold.
- The rooted `partition/4` call publishes a `TupleFields(2)` return need before any artifact work exists.
- Roots submitted before code remain unresolved until the entry definition arrives, then resolve without reseeding unrelated work.
- No `fz.frontend.lowered`, legacy `fz.type_infer.*`, or legacy `fz.planner.*` telemetry appears.
- Tests assert through telemetry and job effects rather than world inspection.

# Non-goals
- Recursive convergence and richer retraction policy are `fz-rh2.6.3`.
- Protocol/runtime callable semantics and `Enum.reduce` are `fz-rh2.7.*`.
- Body-site dispatch (`case`/`with`/`receive`) and artifact work are later tickets.
title: Compiler2 semantic: derive direct-call facts from lowered bodies
